text:
New seeds in the garden this week. 

Added Seedream 5.0 Lite and Gemini 3.1 Flash — faster generation, smarter pixels. Swapped the corporate pitch deck for Slidev because presentations should be code (Nomnom handled the disposal of the old files). 

Also added a pollen panel to the dashboard. Transparency on costs, transparency on code. 

Build something weird with it. 🌸

#pollinations #opensource #generativeai #pixelart #gemini #slidev #buildinpublic #indiedev #creativecoding
